title: Allogene Therapeutics Positions 2026 as a Program-Defining Year for Scalable, Real-World Allogeneic CAR T
text: Allogene Positions 2026 as Program-Defining Year (Jan 8, 2026). Key Announcement: 2026 as pivotal for allogeneic CAR T, with value-defining readouts and clinical maturity unmatched in allogeneic field. Main Programs: Cema-Cel (ALPHA3): Early Q2 2026 interim futility analysis for first-line LBCL consolidation. 25-30% MRD improvement vs observation signals major advance since rituximab. ALLO-329: PoC data by end 1H 2026 for dual CD19/CD70 therapy for autoimmune, with built-in lymphodepletion. ALLO-316: Solid tumor program in RCC showing 31% response in high CD70 patients. Platform Advantages: Off-the-shelf targets 30,000-60,000+ annual doses. COGS under $10K-20K per dose. Deployment beyond academic into community. Financial: Cash runway extends into 2H 2027.
